title: Add Psy-Path-AI to learn
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Psy-Path-AI](https://psy-path-ai.vercel.app/) to learn
- Help engineering students determine career paths using Psy-Path-AI, combining psychological profiling (MBTI + Holland code) with AI-driven personalized chat guidance.

Fixes #9944

gist.headline: Engineering your career path
gist.blurb: Psy-Path-AI just landed in the community greenhouse. It mixes MBTI, Holland codes, and AI chat to help engineering students figure out what to do with their lives.
gist.summary: Added Psy-Path-AI to the community showcase, a new app that combines psychological profiling (MBTI and Holland codes) with AI-driven chat to provide career guidance for engineering students.
gist.impact: Users can now explore a new community-built tool that demonstrates how to use Pollinations for personalized educational and career counseling.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot acting as career counselors. The robot displaying a branching path or brain icon, while Polly holds a tiny clipboard, set in a cozy study room.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses and holding a small clipboard, standing next to a chunky monitor-head robot. The robot's screen displays a glowing branching path diagram. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. A cozy study room setting with code-plants in pots. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
